client_psychology: Brows frame the face — clients notice the difference immediately and get emotional about good brows. Before/afters are the most powerful sales tool. For PMU services (microblading, ombre), clients research extensively and need to see healed results, not just fresh work. Trust in the artist's eye for symmetry and color matching is critical. Many clients don't know what brow shape suits them — education content converts well.
